aeo_readiness.summary: Davis Heating has a solid foundation but lacks the depth in conversational content and schema markup to be cited by AI assistants effectively.
quick_wins: Implement a comprehensive FAQ schema with detailed questions and answers.
Expand service pages with conversational, problem-solving content.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
Q&A section is inactive and unmanaged.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema with detailed service and location information.
FAQPage schema is present but lacks depth and variety in questions.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or repair tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed, conversational content and comprehensive schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and emergency services.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Enhance existing FAQ content and implement detailed service schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the go-to HVAC expert by creating in-depth guides and tutorials.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search and schema markup.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Davis Heating misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with stronger schema and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates detailed schema, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Boost AI Visibility: Optimize Davis Heating for the Future of Search
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found opportunities to enhance your AI search presence.
cta: Let's discuss how we can optimize your content and schema to capture more AI-driven leads.
